title: Cull Obsidian
content:
{{SomethingElse|the Cull Obsidian [[Variant]] from the [[Cosmic Time Heist Universe|2014 Time Heist]]|Cull Obsidian/Cosmic Time Heist|Cull Obsidian}} {{CharHub|Cull Obsidian|Cull Obsidian}} {{Character |image = Cull Obsidian.JPG |real name = Cull Obsidian{{Ref|AIWC}}{{Ref|SI105}} |species = |gender = Male |DOD = [[2018|May 2018]]{{Ref|AIW}}[[:File:Close-Up Magic Website.png|"4/30/2018" on Scott's laptop in ''Ant-Man and the Wasp'']]{{Ref|MSTMCUAOT}} |affiliation = [[Black Order]] |movie = {{Infobox List|{{Collapse|''[[Guardians of the Galaxy (film)|Guardians of the Galaxy]]'' (indirectly mentioned)
}}''[[Avengers: Infinity War]]''}} |tv series = {{Infobox List|{{Collapse|''[[Secret Invasion (TV series)|Secret Invasion]]'' (mentioned)}}}} |comic = ''[[Avengers: Endgame Prelude]]'' |actor = [[Terry Notary]] |status = Deceased}} {{Quote|What is this guy's problem, Mr. Stark?"
"He's from space, and he came here to steal a [[Eye of Agamotto|necklace]] from a [[Doctor Strange|wizard]].|[[Spider-Man]] and [[Iron Man]]|Avengers: Infinity War}} '''Cull Obsidian''' was one of [[Thanos]]' adopted children and a member of the [[Black Order]]. In [[2018]], he aided Thanos in his [[Infinity War|quest]] to obtain all the [[Infinity Stones]] and participated in the [[Attack on the Statesman|attack]] on the ''[[Statesman]]'' before traveling to [[Earth]], where he [[Attack on Greenwich Village|fought]] against [[Iron Man]], [[Doctor Strange]], [[Wong]] and [[Spider-Man]], losing an arm in the process. Regrouping with the Black Order, he received a prosthetic and participated in their [[Battle of Wakanda|assault]] on [[Wakanda]], where he was killed by [[Bruce Banner]] in his [[Iron Man Armor: Mark XLVIII|Hulkbuster armor]]. ==Biography== ===[[Black Order]]=== ====Becoming a Child of Thanos==== Cull Obsidian was a member of a world destroyed by [[Thanos]] in his quest to wipe out half the universe. Thanos took the orphaned Obsidian and raised him as his own child, training him to be a deadly member of the [[Black Order]].{{Ref|AIW}} Obsidian, along with the rest of the Order, was disliked by [[Gamora]] and [[Nebula]].{{Ref|GotG}} ====[[Attack on the Statesman|Attack on the ''Statesman'']]==== {{Quote|Let [[Thanos|him]] have his fun...|[[Ebony Maw]] to Cull Obsidian|Avengers: Infinity War}} [[File:CullObsidian-FirstScene.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Obsidian watches on during [[Thor]]'s suffering]] In [[2018]], Obsidian and the rest of the [[Black Order]] accompanied [[Thanos]] on his [[Infinity War|quest to acquire the Infinity Stones]]. They first went to [[Xandar]], where Thanos stole the [[Orb]] from the [[Nova Corps Headquarters]] after defeating the [[Nova Corps]] and proceeded to [[Massacre of the Xandarians|massacre]] half of the [[Xandarians]]. A week later, the ''[[Sanctuary II]]'' intercepted the ''[[Statesman]]''. [[File:CullObsidianEbonyMaw-LetHimHaveHisFun.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Obsidian watches as [[Thanos]] fights the [[Hulk]]]] Obsidian participated in Thanos' assault on the ''Statesman'' in search of the [[Space Stone]]. After Obsidian and the Order killed half of the [[Asgardians]] on board, Thanos demanded that [[Loki]] hand over the [[Tesseract]] to him in exchange for [[Thor]]’s life. As Loki was going to give the Tesseract to Thanos, [[Hulk]] violently attacked him. Obsidian moved to intervene, but was restrained by [[Ebony Maw]] who told him to let Thanos have his fun. [[File:BlackOrderBowsOverThanos.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Obsidian bows down over [[Thanos]]' allegiance]] After Thanos defeated Hulk, Obsidian watched as [[Heimdall]] used dark [[Magic|magic]] to send him away on the [[Bifrost Bridge]], before being killed. Once the Space Stone was given to Thanos, he placed it in his [[Infinity Gauntlet]], and demanded them to find the rest of the [[Infinity Stones]] on [[Earth]] so they could meet on [[Titan]], leading Obsidian to humbly bow for their father. [[File:Thanos & Black Order Teleport (Statesman).png|{{AltFloat}}|Obsidian and the [[Black Order]] teleport away]] Loki then tried to distract them by telling Thanos that he will be of allegiance to him; however, he was then killed after trying to kill Thanos. Using the power of the newly acquired Space Stone, Thanos made a [[Space Stone|wormhole]] to teleport himself and the Order out of the ''Statesman'', and used the [[Power Stone]] to destroy the ship.{{Ref|AIW}} ====[[Attack on Greenwich Village]]==== [[File:Ebony Maw and Cull Obsidian.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Obsidian and [[Ebony Maw]] arrive on [[Earth]]]] {{Quote|Bring me the [[Time Stone|stone]].|[[Ebony Maw]] to Cull Obsidian|Avengers: Infinity War}} Obsidian and [[Ebony Maw]] traveled to [[New York City]] on [[Earth]] in their [[Q-Ship]]. Upon arriving, Obsidian and Maw beamed down to the street and were confronted by [[Doctor Strange]], [[Wong]], [[Tony Stark]], and [[Bruce Banner]]. After Maw grew irritated with Stark, Obsidian was ordered to bring the [[Time Stone]] to him. [[File:AIW Blu Ray Release 12.png|{{AltFloat}}|Obsidian prepares to attack [[Iron Man]]]] Stark intended for Banner transform into the Hulk and take out Obsidian, but Banner was unable to transform, leaving Stark to take the lead attack. Obsidian rushed forward to fight Stark only to have his attack blocked from his shield and then punched in the face. Stark blasted Obsidian away with his repulsors, sending him flying across the street and Maw moving him away to land on the ground. As Maw battled against the rest of the group, Obsidian threw his [[Cull Obsidian's Chain Hammer|chain hammer]] at Stark, sending him into a nearby park. [[File:Cull Obsidian vs. Spider-Man.png|{{AltFloat}}|Obsidian fighting against [[Spider-Man]]]] Obsidian chased him over to the park, breaking through a building and throwing his hammer at his way. However, he was stopped by [[Peter Parker]], causing frustration and threw him out of the park. [[File:Iron Man & Cull Obsidian.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Obsidian looks over to another battle]] Stark used his repulsors against Obsidian, but he used his own shield to protect himself from the blast. Obsidian grabbed a piece of a taxicab that was cut off and threw it at Stark. Obsidian was then attacked by Parker with the piece of the taxicab that was thrown by him. During the battle, the [[Cloak of Levitation]] flew past, leading Stark to tell Parker to chase after it. During this time, Obsidian gained the upper hand against Stark by slamming him against the ground with his hammer. [[File:Bruce, Wong & Cull Obsidian (Sling Ring Portal).png|{{AltFloat}}|Obsidian is tricked into being in [[Antarctica]]]] Now having Stark being electrocuted from his [[Iron Man Armor: Mark L|suit]] and trapped by the hammer's grasp, Obsidian took this opportunity to kill him with his hidden blade. As Obsidian attacked, Wong used his [[Sling Ring]] to teleport him to [[Antarctica]]. Confused upon the location that he was suddenly being thrown in, Obsidian looked above the [[Inter-Dimensional Portal]] and tried to return through it, but Wong closed it, cutting off his forearm.{{Ref|AIW}} ====[[Battle of Wakanda]]==== [[File:Widow, Cap & BP meet Cull Obsidian & Proxima Midnight (Wakanda).png|{{AltFloat}}|Obsidian confronts his enemies in [[Wakanda]]]] {{Quote|See ya!|[[Bruce Banner]] to Cull Obsidian|Avengers: Infinity War}} Obsidian reunited with [[Proxima Midnight]] and [[Corvus Glaive]] on their [[Q-Ship]], as well as reattaching a new arm. Obsidian and Midnight beamed themselves down into [[Wakanda]] and sent [[Outrider Dropship]]s down, but were unable to get inside due to the protective dome. They walked to the edge of the dome and met [[Steve Rogers]], [[Natasha Romanoff]], and [[T'Challa]]. [[File:Infinity War 227.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Obsidian stands alongside [[Proxima Midnight]]]] Once they refused to give them the [[Mind Stone]], Obsidian and Midnight unleashed the [[Outriders]] from their Dropships to attack. To prevent the Outriders from going around the dome, T'Challa opened a portion of the dome, allowing them to come inside. Upon entering, Obsidian used his [[Cull Obsidian's Chain Hammer|hammer]] to strike [[James Rhodes]], knocking him down. Later, during the [[Battle of Wakanda|battle]], he, along with Midnight, witnessed [[Thor]], [[Groot]], and [[Rocket]]'s arrival. [[File:CGlaive-CObsidian-Vision-InTheWoods.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Obsidian prepares to violently kill [[Vision]]]] Obsidian then started to kill several members of the [[Border Tribe]] and [[Jabari Tribe]], until he was attacked by T'Challa's kinetic energy pulse. Once [[Wanda Maximoff]] had joined the fight, Midnight ordered Glaive to take the Stone, and Obsidian took notice of the conflict and joined Glaive into attacking [[Vision]] in the nearby forest. Obsidian used his hammer to violently hit Vision, sending him deeper into the forest. [[Bruce Banner]] in his [[Iron Man Armor: Mark XLVIII|Hulkbuster armor]] then arrived and threatened to attack the two of them. [[File:CullvsHulkbuster-BrokenArm.png|{{AltFloat}}|Obsidian fighting against [[Bruce Banner]]]] Obsidian managed to use his hammer to close Banner's hands, causing both of them to fly across a nearby waterfall. Obsidian engaged in a fight with Banner in his Hulkbuster armor, as he kept talking to Hulk about saving him from the fight. Obsidian used his broken Chain Hammer to grapple with Banner's left arm and ripping it apart. Once Banner had decided to confront his opponent, Obsidian took a mean left hook to the face while Banner jumped in the air. [[File:ObsidianDeath3.png|{{AltFloat}}|Obsidian is flown into [[Wakanda]]'s forcefield]] Obsidian began to trade blows with Banner in close combat, but he punched Banner away and onto the ground. While Banner was in the ground and had an idea, Obsidian attacked Banner with his hidden blade, but he detached the Hulkbuster's left arm to trap Obsidian's arm in the gauntlet and activated the onboard thruster. Obsidian was sent flying away where he was dragged against the inside of the dome, causing him to burn away before the arm exploded and killed him.{{Ref|AIW}} ===Legacy=== ====DNA Acquired==== [[File:Secret Invasion D23 Trailer (44).png|{{AltFloat}}|Obsidian's arm kept in storage]] {{Quote|What DNA did [[Gravik]] steal?"
"Only a few samples. Cull Obsidian, ''[[Flora colossi|Flora colossus]]''.|[[Nick Fury]] and [[G'iah]]|Harvest (episode)}} Cull Obsidian's severed forearm was recovered by the [[United States Department of Damage Control]] and kept in their custody. In an attempt to gain superhuman DNA in order to become Super-Skrulls, members of the [[Skrull Resistance]] infiltrated [[Damage Control]] and retrieved Obsidian's arm.{{Ref|SI102DS}} Obsidian's severed limb was then studied by the [[Rosa Dalton/Skrull|Rosa Dalton Skrull]], who used the [[Super Skrull Machine]] to transfer Obsidian's DNA to [[Gravik]], granting him access to Obsidian's physiology and abilities.{{Ref|SI102}} ==Powers and Abilities== ===Powers=== *'''Superhuman Strength''': [[File:CullvsHulkbuster-BrokenArm.png|thumb|250px|Obsidian rips off Hulkbuster's arm]] As a result of his great size, Obsidian possessed an incredible level of superhuman strength and was seemingly able to match that of the [[Hulk]], as indicated by Obsidian intending to fight the Hulk for his master [[Thanos]] when Hulk attacked the Mad Titan. Obsidian's strength indeed allowed him to fight [[Iron Man]] and [[Spider-Man]] simultaneously, throw half a taxi with great velocity, and fight on par with, and even overpower, the [[Iron Man Armor: Mark XLVIII|Hulkbuster]], a weapon that was able to defeat the Hulk, though it should be noted that it had already taken damage from several [[Outriders]]. In fact, Obsidian was strong enough to easily rip the Hulkbuster's arm off. *'''Superhuman Durability''': Obsidian possessed tremendous levels of superhuman durability. He could take numerous blows from [[Iron Man]]'s enhanced nanotech suit, as well as missiles, repulsor blasts and beams, blows from the [[Iron Man Armor: Mark XLVIII|Hulkbuster]] armor, and even a full blast of [[T'Challa|Black Panther]]'s kinetic energy projection, all with absolutely no sign of harm. However, Obsidian's durability appears to have a maximum limit, since he was destroyed when [[Bruce Banner]]'s detached Hulkbuster arm lifted and dragged Obsidian into the intense energy of Wakanda's barrier. Despite the event ending in his death, he lasted a considerable amount of time, dying due to the arm exploding. *'''Superhuman Speed''': Obsidian was extremely quick despite his size. He was able to go toe-to-toe with [[Bruce Banner]] in the also incredibly quick [[Iron Man Armor: Mark XLVIII|Hulkbuster Armor]]. *'''Superhuman Stamina''': Obsidian dueled [[Bruce Banner]] for a very long time without tiring. *'''Regenerative Healing Factor''': Obsidian could heal from his injuries at a heightened rate as was demonstrated by his skin repairing itself after it was damaged by Iron Man's repulsor beams. However, even though he can heal his injuries, he cannot regenerate parts of his body. [[Wong]] cut off his hand after closing the portal, and Obsidian's hand was replaced with a cybernetic one. ===Abilities=== *'''Master Combatant''': [[File:Banner pulls Obsidian out of battle.jpeg|thumb|250px|Obsidian fighting against [[Bruce Banner]]]] Despite his ferociousness and recklessness, Obsidian was a highly formidable and accomplished combatant, who used his massive size and strength to great effect. His skill is such that he could have defeated or killed Iron Man thrice if no one else had intervened. During the [[Battle of Wakanda]], Obsidian easily slew many Wakandan warriors and slowly overpowered [[Bruce Banner]] in the [[Iron Man Armor: Mark XLVIII|Hulkbuster Armor]] when he severed the suit's left arm. Obsidian was eventually defeated when Banner trapped his arm in the detached gauntlet of the suit and sent him flying to an explosive demise. *'''Hammer Mastery''': [[File:Spider-Man & Cull Obsidian.png|thumb|250px|Obsidian fighting [[Spider-Man]] with hammer]] Obsidian was very skilled in using his [[Cull Obsidian's Chain Hammer|chain hammer]]. Obsidian wielded it to great effect against his enemies, using it effectively during his fight with Iron Man and killed many Wakandan warriors during the Battle of Wakanda. ==Equipment== ===Weapons=== *'''[[Cull Obsidian's Chain Hammer]]''': [[File:Cull Obsidian & Spider-Man.png|thumb|250px|Obsidian wielding his hammer]] Cull Obsidian utilized a massive multi-tool like a weapon that had a wide range of abilities. It was primarily used as a hammer and the head of the hammer could be launched attached to a chain to hit targets at a distance. It also possessed a claw-like function, being capable of grabbing targets. It could also transform into a shield that was capable of deflecting energy blasts. The upper half of the device can also be launched as a snare while the rest can turn into a long blade. It was also capable of turning into a hooked blade which he used to rip off an arm of the [[Iron Man Armor: Mark XLVIII]]. *'''Arm Blade''': During the fight with [[Iron Man]], Obsidian sported a retractable blade worn along his right arm. ===Other Equipment=== *'''Cybernetic Arm''': [[File:Cullobsidian cyberneticarm.PNG|250px|thumb|Obsidian using his cybernetic arm blade]] Cull Obsidian had his left forearm replaced with a prosthetic, having lost it when it was trapped in a magic portal that was closed by [[Wong]], severing his arm. The prosthetic is capable of turning into a short blade. This prosthetic was destroyed when [[Bruce Banner]] sent him flying into Wakanda's barrier, killing him in an explosion. ===Vehicles=== *'''''[[Sanctuary II]]''''': Cull Obsidian, along the rest of the [[Black Order]], used this massive warship to go to different places in the universe along [[Thanos]] and the army. They used this ship to [[Attack on the Statesman|assault]] the ''[[Statesman]]'' in [[2018]]. *'''''[[Statesman]]''''': Obsidian boarded this massive ship along Thanos and the Black Order to obtain the [[Space Stone]]. After some fights, Thanos obtained the Stone, and they left the ship while it was destroyed by the [[Power Stone]]. *'''[[Q-Ship]]''': Obsidian, along with [[Ebony Maw]], used this spaceship to arrive on [[New York City]] to obtain the [[Time Stone]]. He later boarded another ship to prepare the attack to obtain the [[Mind Stone]] in [[Wakanda]]. *'''[[Outrider Dropship]]''': Cull Obsidian, [[Proxima Midnight]] and [[Corvus Glaive]] used these ships to arrive on [[Wakanda]] before the [[Battle of Wakanda|battle]]. ==Relationships== {{Col-begin}}{{Col-2}} ===Family=== *[[A'Lars]] - Adoptive Grandfather *[[Starfox|Eros/Starfox]] - Adoptive Uncle *[[Thanos]] † - Adoptive Father and Master *[[Black Order]] - Adoptive Siblings, Rivals and Teammates **[[Corvus Glaive]] † - Adoptive Brother **[[Proxima Midnight]] † - Adoptive Sister **[[Ebony Maw]] † - Adoptive Brother *[[Gamora]] † - Adoptive Sister and Rival *[[Nebula]] - Adoptive Sister and Rival ===Allies=== *[[Outriders]] - Subordinates {{Col-2}} ===Enemies=== *[[Asgardians]] **[[Valkyrie|Brunnhilde/Valkyrie]] **[[Heimdall]] † **[[Einherjar]] *[[Sakaaran Rebellion]] **[[Korg]] **[[Miek]] **[[Biff (Rebellion)|Biff]] **[[Tasba]] **[[Roscoe]] † *[[Loki]] † *[[Avengers]] **[[Steve Rogers|Steve Rogers/Captain America]] **[[Iron Man|Tony Stark/Iron Man]] † - Attempted Victim **[[Thor]] **[[Hulk|Bruce Banner/Hulk]] - Attempted Victim and Killer **[[Black Widow|Natasha Romanoff/Black Widow]] † **[[War Machine|James Rhodes/War Machine]] - Attempted Victim **[[Sam Wilson|Sam Wilson/Falcon]] **[[Wanda Maximoff]] † **[[Vision]] † - Attempted Victim *[[Masters of the Mystic Arts]] **[[Doctor Strange|Stephen Strange/Doctor Strange]] **[[Wong]] *[[Spider-Man|Peter Parker/Spider-Man]] *[[Golden Tribe]] **[[T'Challa|T'Challa/Black Panther]] † *[[Winter Soldier|Bucky Barnes/Winter Soldier]] *[[Dora Milaje]] **[[Okoye]] **[[Nomble]] **[[Yama]] *[[Jabari Tribe]] **[[M'Baku]] *[[Border Tribe]] *[[Wakandan Royal Guard]] *[[Guardians of the Galaxy]] **[[Rocket]] **[[Groot]] {{Col-end}} ==Appearances== In chronological order: *{{Appearance|GotG}} (indirectly mentioned) *{{Appearance|AIW}} **{{Appearance|AEP1}} **{{Appearance|AEP2}} **{{Appearance|AEP3}} *{{Appearance|SI102}} (mentioned) *{{Appearance|SI104}} (mentioned) *{{Appearance|SI105}} (mentioned) *{{Appearance|SI106}} (mentioned) ==Trivia== *In the comics, '''Black Dwarf''' was the strongest and most powerful member of the [[Black Order]]. He was expelled from the Order after a failed attempt to conquer [[Wakanda]] and was killed by [[Ronan the Accuser]] when he later attempted to retain his rank by destroying the [[Avengers]]. He was later resuscitated by the [[Grandmaster]]. **The name "Cull Obsidian" is an alternative alias for the Black Order in the comics. ==Behind the Scenes== *Cull Obsidian's appearance was made in three parts: his head was designed by [[Ryan Meinerding]], his body by [[Jerad Marantz]] and his costume by [[Wesley Burt]].[https://www.instagram.com/p/BrBPGibhvwP/ Ryan Meinerding on Instagram] *[[Greg Rementer]] was a stunt double for [[Terry Notary]] in the role of Cull Obsidian. *[[Kevin Marshall]] was a stand-in for [[Terry Notary]] in the role of Cull Obsidian. ==References== {{Gallery|Cull Obsidian/Gallery}} {{Reflist}} ==External Links== *{{Marvel|Black Dwarf}} *{{WP|Black Dwarf (comics)|Black Dwarf}} [[ru:Кулл Обсидиан]] [[Category:Characters]] [[Category:Avengers: Infinity War Characters]] [[Category:Comic Characters]] [[Category:Unknown Race]] [[Category:Cyborgs]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:No Hair]] [[Category:Brown Eyes]] [[Category:Black Order Members]] [[Category:Enhanced Individuals]] [[Category:High Body Count]] [[Category:Deceased Characters]] [[Category:Characters Killed by Hulk]]
